name: what_should_i_know
description: Pre-task intelligence briefing. Given a task description and optional file paths, returns filtered advisories (security alerts, breaking changes), active decision windows, signal chains, relevant past decisions/memories, and a delegation assessment. Call this before starting any non-trivial task to get caught up on what matters.

task.description: Description of what you are about to work on

files.description: File paths involved in the task (optional). Improves relevance filtering.
